title: Loot Chests
description: Map maker utility that adds predefined loot chests.
body:
# Loot Chests

A utility for map makers, which provides access to predefined loot table chests!

Features

  • Chests with predefined loot tables can be found in a new creative tab.
  • A chest with a predefined loot table will generate it's contents when placed. 
  • Custom creative tab contains a search bar to make searching easier.
  • Additional support for mods such as Quark and Dark Utilities
  • Vanilla Compatible: Items and worlds containing these custom chests will function exactly the same when the mod is uninstalled. 
  • Provides support for user defined loot tables!

Mods Supported

  • Quark - All the wood varient chests
  • Dark Utilities - All the chest designs
  • Just Enough Items - Bug fix with chests spamming multiple pages!
